purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` 1..1 `CodeableConcept, Money`

*  R5: `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost[x]` 1..1 `CodeableConcept, Money`
*  R4B: `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost` 1..1 `Money`
*  R4: `MedicationKnowledge.cost.cost` 1..1 `Money`
